assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 12-13 explicitly state: 'Affected version range | versions prior to the fix (imprecise -- no explicit threshold in Jira description)' and 'Fixed version | see advisory (imprecise -- no explicit version in Jira description)'. The 'Critical Data Quality Issue' section (lines 37-41) further confirms: 'The Jira description provides imprecise version data: Affected versions: "versions prior to the fix" -- no explicit version threshold; Fixed version: "see advisory" -- no explicit version number.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 6-16 show the MITRE CVE API section with source 'https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901' and extracted table row 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)' and 'Fix threshold | 0.4.8'. Line 16 states: 'The MITRE CVE record provides a precise, machine-readable version constraint: all versions of h2 with semver less than 0.4.8 are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 19-33 show the OSV.dev API section with source 'https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901' and extracted table rows including 'Fixed | 0.4.8' and 'Range type | SEMVER'. Line 33 states: 'The OSV.dev record confirms the fix at version 0.4.8, with the vulnerability introduced from the initial release (version 0).'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 36-64 contain an explicit cross-validation section. Line 51 states 'Agreement Status: MITRE and OSV.dev AGREE'. The Fix Threshold Comparison Table (lines 40-43) shows both MITRE ('< 0.4.8') and OSV.dev ('fixed: 0.4.8') agree. Lines 57-64 establish the 'Enriched Fix Threshold: Fix threshold for Step 2 version impact analysis: h2 >= 0.4.8 (fixed)' and state 'This enriched threshold replaces the imprecise Jira description data for all subsequent version comparisons.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 3-6 open with 'Enriched Fix Threshold: From Step 1.5 cross-validation: h2 >= 0.4.8 is fixed (both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev agree). Versions of h2 below 0.4.8 are AFFECTED.' The Version Impact Table (lines 15-25) uses '0.4.8' as the comparison threshold throughout (e.g., '0.4.5 < 0.4.8', '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (at fix threshold)'). There is no reference to the imprecise Jira description values ('versions prior to the fix' / 'see advisory') in any comparison.
